Shop.title: Shop
Shop.description: Represents a business or shop using the inventory and billing system. This entity holds the core business configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Shop entity.

name.description: The registered name of the shop.

currency.description: The default currency symbol used by the shop for all transactions (e.g., '₹', '$', '€').

logoUrl.description: URL to the shop's logo image, used for branding on invoices and reports.

shopOwnerId.description: Reference to the external user account that owns or manages this shop. (Relationship: User 1:1 Shop)

secretCode.description: A unique, shareable code for other admins to join the shop.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the shop record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the shop record was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an individual product or service offered by the shop, including inventory details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

shopId.description: Reference to the Shop this product belongs to. (Relationship: Shop 1:N Product)

description.description: A detailed description of the product, potentially generated by an AI assistant.

price.description: The current selling price of one unit of the product.

quantity.description: The current stock quantity of the product available in the inventory. Must be a non-negative integer.

imageUrl.description: URL to the product's image for display in the inventory.

lowStockThreshold.description: The quantity level at which the product is considered low in stock, triggering alerts. Must be a non-negative integer.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the product record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the product record was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer who has made or might make a purchase from the shop, storing their contact and purchasing history details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

shopId.description: Reference to the Shop this customer is associated with. (Relationship: Shop 1:N Customer)

name.description: The full name of the customer.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

address.description: The physical address of the customer, used for billing or contact.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the customer record was last updated.

Bill.title: Bill
Bill.description: Represents a single sales transaction, serving as an invoice record and tracking purchase history.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bill entity (internal bill ID).

shopId.description: Reference to the Shop where this bill was created. (Relationship: Shop 1:N Bill)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer associated with this bill. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Bill)

customerAuthUid.description: Firebase UID of the customer, used for denormalized authorization and history tracking.

invoiceNumber.description: A unique, human-readable invoice number generated for the bill, for official documentation.

billDate.description: The date and time when the bill was created or finalized.

subtotal.description: The sum of all product item totals before tax is applied.

taxAmount.description: The total tax amount applied to the bill.

totalAmount.description: The final total amount of the bill, including subtotal and tax.

status.description: The current status of the bill (e.g., 'draft', 'finalized', 'paid', 'cancelled').

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the bill record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the shop record was last updated.

BillItem.title: BillItem
BillItem.description: Represents a single line item within a Bill, detailing a specific product sold and its state (price, name) at the time of sale for historical accuracy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BillItem entity.

billId.description: Reference to the Bill this item belongs to. (Relationship: Bill 1:N BillItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product entity that was sold. This links the bill item to the original product data. (Relationship: Product 1:N BillItem)

productName.description: The name of the product at the time of sale (snapshot to preserve historical data).

customerAuthUid.description: Firebase UID of the customer, denormalized from the parent Bill for optimized authorization.

quantity.description: The quantity of this specific product included in the bill item. Must be a positive integer.

unitPrice.description: The unit price of the product at the time of sale (snapshot to preserve historical data).

itemTotal.description: The total amount for this bill item, calculated as quantity * unitPrice.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the bill item record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the bill item record was last updated.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a customer's public profile and settings.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biographical description about the user.

points.description: The loyalty points balance of the user.

tier.description: The membership tier of the user.

isVerified.description: Whether the user's identity is verified.

AdminProfile.title: Admin Profile
AdminProfile.description: Represents a user with administrative privileges.

role.description: The administrative role of the user.

email.description: The user's email, denormalized for easier display in admin panels.

definition.description: Products belonging to a specific shop.
Customer records specific to a shop.
Sales transactions (invoices) for a specific shop.
Individual line items associated with a specific bill.
Stores public profile information for each user.
Stores a record of users who have been granted administrative privileges.
